programme.title: Arena in 30
programme.sub-title: S2023 : E08 Intrust Bank Arena - Wichita, KS
programme.desc: Earth Shaker’s Tristan England leads Arena Championship Series Central into Wichita, Kansas. The question at hand, can El Toro Loco’s Elvis Lainez once again climb to the top of the points standings? Will Krysten Anderson lead Grave Digger back to victory? Those questions will be answered when Monster Jam kicks off at Intrust Bank Arena.

programme.title: Monster Jam Fast Track
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Angel Stadium, Anaheim, CA
programme.desc: Round four of Monster Jam Fast Track storms into Angels Stadium in Anaheim, delivering the raw power and fearless competition of the Stadium Championship Series West. The stadium roars as elite drivers face off in high-stakes JCB Racing, technical Great Clips Skills challenges, and a gravity-defying Freestyle finale. Tension peaks during legendary head-to-head battles, including a fierce clash between rivals Grave Digger and Megalodon, as competitors push their 12,000-pound machines to the absolute limit. With horsepower measured in the thousands and emotions pushed to the edge, this event is a masterclass in precision and mechanical mayhem.

programme.title: Monster Jam Replay
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 PPG Paints Arena - Pittsburgh, PA
programme.desc: The high-octane energy of the Arena Championship Series East hits the Steel City as Monster Jam takes over PPG Paints Arena in Pittsburgh. This episode features elite drivers pushing their 12,000-pound machines to the limit in JCB Racing, the technical Skills Challenge, and a spectacular Freestyle finale. Watch as the intensity peaks with a high-stakes family showdown between Jon Zimmer and his son, Jon Zimmer Jr., and follow the inspiring journey of MJ Solorio as he transforms from a "super fan to superstar" behind the wheel of El Toro Loco. From the legendary rivalry of Grave Digger to Coty Saucier's masterful performance in Dragon, witness a night of shattered limits and epic dirt-shredding action.

programme.title: Championship Series
programme.sub-title: S2023 : E01 Snapdragon Stadium - San Diego, CA
programme.desc: Stadium Championship Series Blue kicks-off the 2023 Monster Jam Season in San Diego’s SnapDragon Stadium. Grave Digger’s Tyler Menninga attempts to win his 3rd consecutive event in San Diego, California while Son-Uva Digger’s Ryan Anderson begins defense of series championship.

programme.title: Monster Jam Replay
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Allstate Arena - Rosemont, Illinois
programme.desc: The Freestyle Mania Championship Series descends upon the historic Allstate Arena in Rosemont for a high-octane round of world-class monster truck action. Limits are shattered on the dirt as superstars like Weston Anderson and Fernando Martinez face off against hungry rookies in a series of punishing JCB Racing brackets and gravity-defying Best Trick competitions. Rivalries reach a boiling point on the tight Rosemont track, where veterans and newcomers alike must push their 12,000-pound machines to the edge in a final, spectacular Freestyle showdown to crown the night's champion.

programme.title: Championship Series

programme.title: 1% of Something
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 1% of Something
programme.desc: Jae In proposed to Da Hyeon, married after many twists and turns and lived happily as a married couple.

programme.title: My Secret Romance
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 My Secret Romance
programme.desc: A rich playboy Jin Wook starts work in his father's resort as a bellhop. He keeps encounter Yoo Mi.

programme.title: My Secret Romance
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 My Secret Romance
programme.desc: After spending a night with Jin Wook, Yoo Mi run away from him. 3 years later, she becomes a nutritionist.

programme.title: My Secret Romance
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 My Secret Romance
programme.desc: Yoo Mi struggles to meet the unreasonable demands of her boss.

programme.title: My Secret Romance
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 My Secret Romance
programme.desc: Yoo Mi brings a meal to Jin Wook’s office and she encounters him with Hye Ri. Hye Ri is jealous of Yoo Mi.

programme.title: My Secret Romance
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 My Secret Romance
programme.desc: Yoo Mi takes Dong Goo to Jin Wook’s house and Dong Goo accidentally breaks an expensive jewelry box.

programme.title: My Secret Romance
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 My Secret Romance
programme.desc: Jin Wook makes Yoo Mi work overtime to prevent Yoo Mi from spending time together with Hyeon Tae.

programme.title: My Secret Romance
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 My Secret Romance
programme.desc: Yoo Mi agrees to pay for the jewelry box and medical fees by having dinner with Jin Wook ten times.

programme.title: My Secret Romance
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 My Secret Romance
programme.desc: Yoo Mi goes to Jin Wook’s house to cook a meal and just about to sit down to eat, Jin Wook’s father drops by.

programme.title: My Secret Romance
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 My Secret Romance
programme.desc: Yoo Mi and Jin Wook stay at one of the company’s resorts. Meanwhile, in Seoul, Hye Ri visits Hyeon Tae.

programme.title: My Secret Romance
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 My Secret Romance
programme.desc: When Dae Bok sees Jin Wook playing with Dong Goo, he thinks that Yoo Mi and Jin Wook had a child.

programme.title: My Secret Romance
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 My Secret Romance
programme.desc: Hye Ri harasses Yoo Mi. Meanwhile, Dae Bok visits Yoo Mi’s home to find out if Dong Goo is his grandchild.

programme.title: My Secret Romance
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 My Secret Romance
programme.desc: After she quits her job, Yoo Mi moves to Daejeon to work at a university. Hyeon Tae comes to visit her.

programme.title: My Secret Romance
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 My Secret Romance
programme.desc: Yoo Mi blames her mom for her misfortune and goes to the beach where she first met Jin Wook.

programme.title: My Secret Romance
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 My Secret Romance
programme.desc: Yoo Mi disappears the next morning, but Jin Wook decides to wait until whenever she comes back.

programme.title: The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.desc: 1958, Gangwondo. When bumped into the mermaid trapped in small pond, Dam Ryeong releases her into the sea.

programme.title: The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.desc: Joon Jae and the mermaid somehow start to live together but the two soon get chased by gangsters at Spain.

programme.title: The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.desc: The mermaid starts a tough journey to Seoul to keep her promise with Joon Jae.

programme.title: The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.desc: Feeling a deja vu, Joon Jae helps the mermaid to get out of the aquarium and the two see fireworks together.

programme.title: The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.desc: Joon Jae wonders why he has a slight sense of deja vu to the mermaid, Sim Cheong.

programme.title: The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.desc: Joon Jae panics when heard Sim Cheong went to the emergency room but Chi Hyeon says it was just an accident.

programme.title: The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.desc: Joon Jae loses his memory of the time he spent with Sim Cheong at Spain. Dong Pyo looks for clues of murder.

programme.title: The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.desc: Joon Jae gets confused of his feeling to Sim Cheong. He recalls Yang Seung Gil when ran into Ma Dae Young.

programme.title: The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.desc: Joon Jae finds out that Ma Dae Young was the one who had threatened him and was looking for Sim Cheong.

programme.title: The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.desc: Joon Jae wonders the meaning of the messages that Dam Ryeong sent through his dream.

programme.title: The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.desc: Sim Cheong leaves the house in disappointment with Joon Jae. Meanwhile, Dong Pyo learns Ma Dae Young's secret.

programme.title: The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.desc: Joon Jae tries to find Sim Cheong worrying that she's been out of contact for days.

programme.title: The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.desc: Joon Jae finds something suspicious while looking for the clues of Ma Dae Young's kidnapping of Sim Cheong.

programme.title: The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.desc: Joon Jae learns that he is following the same path as his previous life and decides to protect Sim Cheong.

programme.title: The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.desc: Joon Jae tries to tell Sim Cheong about his dreams of Dam Ryeong. Sim Cheong invites her friends to the party.

programme.title: The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.desc: Joon Jae finally reunite with Yu Ran, his biological mother. Chi Hyeon begins to look for his real father.

programme.title: The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.sub-title: S01 : E17 The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.desc: Sim Cheong becomes confused when the memory of how Dam Ryeong and she broke up in the past got recalled.

programme.title: The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.desc: After the death of Heo Il Joong, Joon Jae and Dong Pyo speed up their investigation.

programme.title: The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.desc: Sim Cheong gets shot instead of Joon Jae, and Ma Dae Young visits Professor Jin to bring back all his memory.

programme.title: The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 The Legend of the Blue Sea
programme.desc: Sim Cheong says last goodbye to the people around her to go back to the sea.

programme.title: Devilish Joy
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Devilish Joy
programme.desc: Gi Bbeum and Ma Seong meet by chance, and they promised to see each other again, but an accident happens.

programme.title: Devilish Joy
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Devilish Joy
programme.desc: Ma Seong is confused when he keeps thinking about Gi Bbeum's face so he instructs the secretary to find her.

programme.title: Devilish Joy
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Devilish Joy
programme.desc: The doctor tells Ma Seong that he seems to be in love. Ki Joon tries to scout Gi Bbeum to his company.

programme.title: Devilish Joy
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Devilish Joy
programme.desc: Gi Bbeum is forced to sign a contract with an entertainment company because of her father.

programme.title: Devilish Joy
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Devilish Joy
programme.desc: Ma Seong side with Ha Im when Gi Bbeum has a quarrel with her, Gi Bbeum said she regrets meeting Ma Seong.

programme.title: Devilish Joy
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Devilish Joy
programme.desc: Gi Bbeum with Aquaphobia appears on entertainment shows and is criticized by the public again.

programme.title: Devilish Joy
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Devilish Joy
programme.desc: Gi Bbeum asks Ma Seong, who helped her, to have dinner with her.

programme.title: Devilish Joy
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Devilish Joy
programme.desc: Gi Bbeum gets angry at Ma Seong who didn’t show up again, she is jealous that Ma Seong is with Ha Im.

programme.title: Devilish Joy
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Devilish Joy
programme.desc: Gi Bbeum realized that Ma Seong couldn’t come to meet her in Hainan because of the accident.

programme.title: Devilish Joy
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Devilish Joy
programme.desc: Ma Seong and Gi Bbeum finally start dating and Jin Yang goes to the house of Gi Bbeum to humiliate her father.

programme.title: Devilish Joy
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Devilish Joy
programme.desc: Ha Im asks Ki Joon to marry her. Jin Yang convenes an emergency board meeting to bring Ma Seong's dismissal.

programme.title: Devilish Joy
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Devilish Joy
programme.desc: Beom Soo asks police to reinvestigate the case of Hyeong Joon's death, Gi Bbeum receives a call from police.

programme.title: Devilish Joy
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Devilish Joy
programme.desc: Ma Seong promises to Gi Bbeum, who went to the prosecution's investigation, that he will protect her.

programme.title: Devilish Joy
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Devilish Joy
programme.desc: Ma Seong suspects that the accident three years ago may not be a coincidence.

programme.title: Devilish Joy
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Devilish Joy
programme.desc: Ma Seong decides to break up with Gi Bbeum and he shows tears as he greets Gi Bbeum, who is going to LA.

programme.title: Devilish Joy
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Devilish Joy
programme.desc: Gi Bbeum waits for Ma Seong who has left and a letter arrives at Gi Bbeum.

programme.title: Lovers of the Red Sky
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Lovers of the Red Sky
programme.desc: Cheon Gi, a blind girl, meets Ha Ram, who was on his way to a ritual. During the ritual the Devil gets loose.

programme.title: Lovers of the Red Sky
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Lovers of the Red Sky
programme.desc: Cheon Gi becomes a painter who paints imitation and sells them for money to buy medicine for her father.

programme.title: Lovers of the Red Sky
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Lovers of the Red Sky
programme.desc: After helping Cheon Gi and accidentally making physical contact, the demon inside Ha Ram wakes up.

programme.title: Lovers of the Red Sky
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Lovers of the Red Sky
programme.desc: Cheon Gi’s father collapses so she decides to participate in Maejukheon Painting Contest to save her father.

programme.title: Lovers of the Red Sky
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Lovers of the Red Sky
programme.desc: Cheon Gi fails the first round but gets a free pass from Han Geon because he’s sure she’s a blessed painter.

programme.title: Lovers of the Red Sky
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Lovers of the Red Sky
programme.desc: Cheon Gi and Ha Ram go on a stroll and end up kissing which almost wakes up the Demon inside Ha Ram.

programme.title: Lovers of the Red Sky
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Lovers of the Red Sky
programme.desc: Cheon Gi wins the contest and she decides to go to Gohwawon to find the truth about her father’s madness.

programme.title: Lovers of the Red Sky
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Lovers of the Red Sky
programme.desc: Cheon Gi enters Gohwawon to start working and the late King’s portrait later calls the demon inside Ha Ram.

programme.title: Lovers of the Red Sky
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Lovers of the Red Sky
programme.desc: Ha Ram finds out about the demon inside him and Cheon Gi finds out why she was chosen to restore the portrait.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Z Nation
programme.desc: After taking refuge in a safe enclave where no weapons are allowed, the team finds itself thrust into a battle for control of the compound against a zombie-worshipping cult.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Z Nation
programme.desc: When the last surviving cosmonaut from the International Space Station crashes on Earth, Citizen Z gets a real, live buddy - but it quickly becomes clear that his new friend has a secret agenda.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Z Nation
programme.desc: Split off from the others, Mack and Addy find themselves trapped by a zombie they just can't kill. A series of escalating fights forces them to confront an ugly truth hidden in their past.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Z Nation

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Z Nation

programme.title: Z Nation

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Z Nation
programme.desc: In need of shelter and supplies, the team seeks refuge in an all-female compound where men are not allowed.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Z Nation
programme.desc: A change in plans has the team re-routed to a Colorado viral lab located in a nuclear missile silo. The team searches for Dr. Merch, the developer of the experimental vaccine previously given to Murphy.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 Z Nation
programme.desc: Picking up moments after the launch of the tactical nuclear weapons, the team is split up trying to outrun the impending blast. Citizen Z finds himself battling thawed zombies, ultimately issuing an on-air bounty for Murphy.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Z Nation
programme.desc: Each member of the group goes through a near-death experience while being attacked by bounty hunters. Mack is bitten after being caught in a zombie-infested stairwell.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Z Nation
programme.desc: A tornado forces the team to Warren's hometown, where she searches for her husband who she lost track of in the early days of the apocalypse.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Z Nation
programme.desc: Lost and out of water in rural Kansas, the team is on the verge of breaking up before arriving at a Wild West-style bar. Guns, liquor and a zombie-shooting contest: what could go wrong?

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Z Nation
programme.desc: When the last surviving cosmonaut from the International Space Station crashes on Earth, Citizen Z gets a real, live buddy - but it quickly becomes clear that his new friend has a secret agenda.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Z Nation
programme.desc: Split off from the others, Mack and Addy find themselves trapped by a zombie they just can't kill. A series of escalating fights forces them to confront an ugly truth hidden in their past.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Z Nation
programme.desc: While in South Dakota, an imminent meltdown forces the team to help the locals repair a nearby nuclear power plant full of radiated zombies.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Z Nation
programme.desc: Some strangers earn their ways into the team, taking a keen interest in Murphy, but things take a deadly turn.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Z Nation
programme.desc: A change in plans has the team re-routed to a Colorado viral lab located in a nuclear missile silo. The team searches for Dr. Merch, the developer of the experimental vaccine previously given to Murphy.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 Z Nation
programme.desc: Picking up moments after the launch of the tactical nuclear weapons, the team is split up trying to outrun the impending blast. Citizen Z finds himself battling thawed zombies, ultimately issuing an on-air bounty for Murphy.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Z Nation
programme.desc: Each member of the group goes through a near-death experience while being attacked by bounty hunters. Mack is bitten after being caught in a zombie-infested stairwell.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 Z Nation
programme.desc: After finally tracking down Murphy, the group comes across a caravan of survivors transporting victims of the nuclear blast to safety. Along the way, the mission is attacked by "blasters," zombies mutated by the radioactive fallout.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 Z Nation
programme.desc: Murphy's past comes back to haunt him when Serena tracks him down. The team stumbles upon a hidden farm.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Z Nation
programme.desc: Murphy separates from the group out of fear that they may take the baby away - and kill her. Vasquez and Warren are injured and wind up in an abandoned hospital. 10K is forced to make a tragic decision during a conflict with Cassandra.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Z Nation
programme.desc: While crossing the Mississippi River, the group is involved in an accident and 10K is separated. At a nearby settlement, 10K and some new friends run into trouble with the settlement's leader, Escorpion.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 Z Nation
programme.desc: Tricked into a trap by use of a fresh brain lure, Murphy is captured by a zombie fan known as The Collector.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E10 Z Nation
programme.desc: Murphy, Warren, Vasquez and Addy find themselves at a casino while 10K and Doc are captured by Natives.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E11 Z Nation
programme.desc: The group becomes embroiled in corporate politics while seeking shelter at a hotel overtaken by white-collar survivors. There, Murphy is hunted.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E12 Z Nation
programme.desc: Near the Mexican border, the group is rescued from a zombie hoard by Escorpion, who leads them to La Reina, the "Queen of the Dead." As a bounty for Murphy, La Reina offers them a reward or a free pass to join her group.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E13 Z Nation
programme.desc: All hell breaks loose when it's discovered that not only does Dr. Kurian's vaccine not work but everyone who was injected will come under Murphy's control after an incubation period.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Z Nation
programme.desc: On the quest for a cure for the virus, the group makes its way to the greenhouse where Batch 47 is being grown by Odegard. There, Odegard warns them about zombie-plant hybrids.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 Z Nation
programme.desc: Murphy's past comes back to haunt him when Serena tracks him down. The team stumbles upon a hidden farm.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Z Nation
programme.desc: Murphy separates from the group out of fear that they may take the baby away - and kill her. Vasquez and Warren are injured and wind up in an abandoned hospital. 10K is forced to make a tragic decision during a conflict with Cassandra.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Z Nation
programme.desc: While crossing the Mississippi River, the group is involved in an accident and 10K is separated. At a nearby settlement, 10K and some new friends run into trouble with the settlement's leader, Escorpion.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E09 Z Nation
programme.desc: Near Roswell, New Mexico, the group encounters a community, led by a woman called Bernadette, which they believe is above a secret underground base that may contain useful equipment.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E10 Z Nation
programme.desc: Murphy, Warren, Vasquez and Addy find themselves at a casino while 10K and Doc are captured by Natives.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E15 Z Nation
programme.desc: In Los Angeles, the team drives through the abandoned city to the coordinates of the mobile CDC lab provided by Citizen Z. There, they discover the lab isn't just a lab - it's a submarine.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S03 : E01 Z Nation
programme.desc: In this epic flashback movie, the gang protects the town against a new enemy known as The Man. Part 1.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S03 : E02 Z Nation
programme.desc: In this epic flashback movie, the gang protects the town against a new enemy known as The Man. Part 2.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S03 : E03 Z Nation
programme.desc: Warren and the group are taken prisoner while Murphy manages to escape with his newly formed group of blends.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S03 : E05 Z Nation
programme.desc: As more people flock to Murphy's new cult, Dr. Merch works on a blend vaccine as well as a booster shot to slow to Murphy's descent into zombiedom.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S03 : E06 Z Nation
programme.desc: Alone and suffering from the effects of Merch's booster, 10K barely escapes Murphy and is stalked by a blend.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S03 : E07 Z Nation
programme.desc: Doc finds himself taken captive by a psychotic nurse and her surviving mental patients, and he later discovers that 10K is being held too.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S03 : E08 Z Nation
programme.desc: Seemingly injected with the blend vaccine, The Man attempts to kidnap Murphy but underestimates the strength of Murphy's followers. However, he does manage to learn about Lucy's existence. 10K reunites with the group.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E14 Z Nation
programme.desc: The team finally arrives in California. As they near their goal, each member thinks back to where they were at the beginning of the apocalypse and what it took to get where they are today.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E15 Z Nation
programme.desc: In Los Angeles, the team drives through the abandoned city to the coordinates of the mobile CDC lab provided by Citizen Z. There, they discover the lab isn't just a lab - it's a submarine.

programme.sub-title: S03 : E01 Z Nation
programme.desc: In this epic flashback movie, the gang protects the town against a new enemy known as The Man. Part 1.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S03 : E02 Z Nation
programme.desc: In this epic flashback movie, the gang protects the town against a new enemy known as The Man. Part 2.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S03 : E04 Z Nation
programme.desc: While on the road to establish his headquarters in Spokane, Murphy saves the life of a dying girl. When her parents show up and ask to be bitten too, his mission gains momentum. Meanwhile, Warren leads the new mission group to a strange town.

programme.sub-title: S03 : E05 Z Nation
